projects.name: Cockpit Sink Basin, Seal to Countertop
projects.notes: This will prevent water from running down into the engine room. Water is presently free to travel between the gel coat counter top around the lip of the basin and under the sink.

scopeTasks.desc: Lift sink basin, clean seating surface on underside of sink and on countertop countersink. Tape off stainless sink and gel coat and b ed with 3M 4200 sealant. Pull tape.

photos.caption: These are not serviceable. In order to get the system certified we will need to purchase serviceable hand held extinguishers.
